title: sida sulphurea
intro: Sida sulphurea, also known as the Yellow Rattle, is a flowering plant native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sida sulphurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support the immune system. It is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs for its medicinal effects.
